steps.title: Locate the feedback source
steps.content: The passage says Carter's plays were rarely staged or published, but that she still could learn what people thought. Her weekly gatherings included writers and artists reading and discussing one another's work, including her own.

steps.title: Connect the gatherings
steps.content: Choice A contradicts the point about professional theater companies. Choice C shifts to productions in other cities, which are not mentioned. Choice D suggests future subject matter, which the passage does not support. The remaining choice identifies the gatherings as a feedback opportunity. The answer is B.
